expectations.text: References https://docs.deno.com/deploy/migration_guide/ or explicitly names the official Deploy Classic migration guide.
expectations.evidence: Line 29 references the official Deploy Classic migration guide URL.

expectations.text: Separates code-inspection findings from manual dashboard steps.
expectations.evidence: Lines 3-17 describe repo/code findings, while lines 18-29 list dashboard and DNS steps.

expectations.text: Provides a KV migration path with preview or dry-run behavior before real import.
expectations.evidence: Lines 31-50 include inventory, preview, dry-run import, real import, verification, and skip-existing behavior.

expectations.text: Keeps support@deno.com as a fallback rather than the only migration path.
expectations.evidence: Line 52 explicitly says support is fallback, not the primary path.
